query:
SELECT monster_id, name, rarity, drop_item_1, drop_rate_1, drop_item_2, drop_rate_2, drop_item_3, drop_rate_3, drop_item_4, drop_rate_4, drop_item_5, drop_rate_5, legendary_drop, legendary_drop_rate 
FROM game_monster_catalog 
WHERE rarity IN ('elite', 'epic', 'boss') 
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT monster_id, name, rarity, drop_item_1, drop_rate_1, drop_item_2, drop_rate_2, drop_item_3, drop_rate_3, drop_item_4, drop_rate_4, drop_item_5, drop_rate_5, legendary_drop, legendary_drop_rate 
FROM game_monster_catalog 
WHERE rarity IN ('elite', 'epic', 'boss') 
LIMIT 10
